entry.title: i wont be posting videos for 2 or 3 days because oy vey surprised me with a little holiday!!!! thank you oy vey

entry.title: thank you for the best holiday oy vey!!!
entry.content: thank you for the best holiday oy vey!!!

entry.title: a really dumb breadcrumb because i filmed a really good collab video today but im going to have to edit it tomorrow as its a lot of footage !! i just saw this helium sign after we finished. i wish i had gone more in on the high voice but i was scared, sor
entry.content: a really dumb breadcrumb because i filmed a really good collab video today but im going to have to edit it tomorrow as its a lot of footage !! i just saw this helium sign after we finished. i wish i had gone more in on the high voice but i was scared, sor
